function.name: home_automation_execute_action
function.description: Execute action on named device, optionally specifying the zone in which the device is located.

action_name.description: action to be executed on device.

device_name.description: the human-readable name of the device.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where the device is located, optional.

function.name: home_automation_get_device_status
function.description: Get the internal status of the named device, optionally specifying the zone in which the device is located.

device_name.description: the human-readable name of the device.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where device is located, optional.

function.name: home_automation_get_property
function.description: Get the value of a physical property of the named device, optionally specifying the zone in which the device is located.

physical_property.description: physical property for which the value is obtained.

device_name.description: the human-readable name of the device.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where device is located, optional.

function.name: home_automation_read_sensor_value
function.description: Read the value of the named sensor, optionally specifying the zone in which the sensor is located.

sensor_name.description: the human-readable name of the sensor.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where the sensor is located, optional.

function.name: home_automation_set_property
function.description: Set the physical property value to the named device, optionally specifying the zone in which the device is located.

value.description: new value for the physical property.

device_name.description: the human-readable name of the device.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where device is located, optional.
